description_long: This megaphone features a cylindrical body with alternating green and wood-toned brown stripes running lengthwise along its exterior. The flared mouthpiece is wide and circular, with a smooth green finish and a dark, hollow interior, suggesting a functional sound projection area. The rear end is capped with a solid green disc, lacking any visible openings or controls. The surface appears hard and slightly glossy, with a seamless construction and no visible seams or fasteners. There are no visible handles, buttons, or branding elements on any side. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for public address or crowd control in urban environments.
description: A striped green and brown megaphone with a wide flared mouthpiece and a solid green rear cap, featuring a smooth, hard surface and no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, flared green mouthpiece with a dark, hollow interior.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the cylindrical body with alternating green and brown stripes, and the flared mouthpiece.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid green cap, with no visible openings or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the striped cylindrical body and the flared mouthpiece.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: Wide, circular, flared green mouthpiece with a smooth rim and a hollow opening.
